assertions.title: Default amount is 1 on first visit

steps.action: Clear localStorage/sessionStorage and load http://localhost:3002/ with no URL params

assertions.issues: First-visit default amount is 1000 instead of 1.

assertions.title: Ethereum defaults to USDC -> crvUSD
assertions.issues: Ethereum default To token is WETH, not crvUSD.

assertions.title: Non-Ethereum chains default to USDC -> native token
assertions.issues: BSC default From token is USDT instead of USDC.

steps.action: With empty localStorage on Base defaults, capture form state

steps.expected: From/To update to Ethereum defaults when no saved per-chain prefs exist
steps.observed: From/To changed to Ethereum pair (USDC -> WETH)

assertions.title: Selections saved to localStorage after comparison

steps.action: Set chain=Ethereum, amount=7, slippage=100 and run Compare Quotes
steps.expected: Successful comparison and preferences saved in localStorage
steps.observed: Compare returned 200; localStorage key flashprofits-preferences stored chainId=1, amount=7, slippageBps=100, mode=exactIn, perChainTokens[1]

assertions.title: Saved selections restored on return visit

steps.action: Reload page without URL params after VAL-PREF-001 save
Set localStorage preferences to conflicting values (chainId=1, amount=99, slippage=300)
Open URL with explicit params (chainId=8453, from=0x8335..., to=0x4200..., amount=2, slippageBps=50)
steps.expected: Form uses URL values over localStorage
steps.observed: Form showed Base, USDC(0x8335...), WETH(0x4200...), amount=2, slippage=50

evidence.network: GET /compare?...amount=2&slippageBps=50 -> 200 (one earlier aborted request observed during navigation)

steps.action: Write malformed JSON to flashprofits-preferences localStorage and reload
steps.expected: App falls back to defaults with no console errors
steps.observed: App loaded default form state (Base, default tokens, amount=1000/slippage=50) and console remained clean

frictions.description: Playwright browser startup initially failed due stale Chrome profile lock files (SingletonLock/SingletonSocket/SingletonCookie).
frictions.resolution: Removed stale lock files and retried browser startup successfully.

frictions.description: Chain combobox text had to be filtered by partial value (e.g., 'BSC') before selecting option; direct full-text fill intermittently returned 'No chains match'.
frictions.resolution: Used combobox filter + explicit option click workflow.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 5 passed, 3 failed. Failures were in default values (amount and default token pairs): VAL-DEF-001, VAL-DEF-002, VAL-DEF-003. Preference persistence assertions VAL-PREF-001 through VAL-PREF-004 passed with localStorage and URL override behavior confirmed.
